title: Renumbered pursuant to HR 6, 2013 R.S., eff. May 30, 2013.
doc_html:
Rule 8.26. Renumbered pursuant to HR 6, 2013 R.S., eff. May 30, 2013.


NOTE: 8.26 renumbered 8.20 by authority of House Rule 2.10(D)(4). See HR 6, eff. May 30, 2013, for repeal of prior 8.20.
doc_text:
Rule 8.26.
Renumbered pursuant to HR 6, 2013 R.S., eff. May 30, 2013.
NOTE: 8.26 renumbered 8.20 by authority of House Rule 2.10(D)(4).  See HR 6, eff. May
30, 2013, for repeal of prior 8.20.
